title: Selling Online Without Gumroad: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Imagine spending months creating a digital course, only to be blocked by PayPal's restrictions on transactions from Nigeria. You're not alone. Many digital creators in restricted countries face similar hurdles when trying to sell their products online. Gumroad's refusal to serve certain countries leaves you with limited options. You're forced to either abandon your dream or explore untested platforms that may not meet your needs. The stakes are high, but the alternatives are often far from ideal. It's time to take control of your online sales and explore a more reliable, secure, and flexible way to connect with your customers. Let's break down the options and find a solution that works for you.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad and PayPal offer a traditional payment processing experience, but their restrictions on certain countries can leave you high and dry. You're forced to navigate a complex landscape of international banking, KYC requirements, and high fees. Meanwhile, NOWPayments, a crypto-native payment processor, provides a streamlined, automated experience that allows you to focus on your business, not paperwork. With NOWPayments, you can accept payments in 300+ coins and deliver your products instantly, without any hassle.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Gumroad and PayPal have strict policies against serving countries with high-risk profiles, which includes many African and Asian nations. This means you're blocked from using their services, no matter how legitimate your business is. NOWPayments, on the other hand, welcomes creators from all over the world, including restricted countries. Their crypto-native infrastructure ensures that you can operate without any geographical limitations, giving you the freedom to sell to anyone, anywhere.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment processing fees can eat into your profits, especially when you're working with a traditional platform like Gumroad or PayPal. They charge high fees, often ranging from 3.5% to 5% per transaction. NOWPayments, however, offers a more transparent pricing model with lower fees, starting at 0.5% per transaction. This means you keep more of your hard-earned money and can invest it back into your business.
Traditional payment processors often have strict policies against serving certain countries, leaving creators with limited options.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The risk of platform dependency is asymmetric in a specific way that most creators underestimate. When PayPal or Stripe is working, everything seems fine. When it stops working — through suspension, policy change, or geographic restriction enforcement — you lose access to your revenue channel instantly, often with funds already inside the platform that you cannot withdraw. Rebuilding on a new platform takes weeks. The income gap during that period is real money lost. Crypto-native infrastructure removes this asymmetric risk. Your wallet cannot be suspended. Your GitHub Pages store cannot be taken down by a payment platform's compliance team. The infrastructure is under your control from day one, which means no single external decision can cut off your income.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Choosing crypto-native infrastructure does not mean your buyers need to understand crypto. The Web3 Wallet Connect module generates QR codes for each supported coin, displays live USD-equivalent prices, and guides buyers through the payment flow in plain language. Most buyers complete a crypto payment in under two minutes, even if it is their first time. NOWPayments handles the transaction confirmation and fires the webhook that triggers automated delivery. From the buyer's perspective, they paid and received their product. From your perspective, you received funds in a wallet you control without any platform intermediary between you and your revenue. That is the practical outcome of building on the right infrastructure from the start.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Crypto-native payment processors like NOWPayments offer a more flexible and transparent way to process payments, without geographical limitations.

Your Action Checklist

Here's a step-by-step guide to getting started with NOWPayments and the Full Stack Bundle: Sign up for NOWPayments and create a payment gateway. Integrate NOWPayments with your website using the Full Stack Bundle. Configure your automated delivery settings to ensure seamless product delivery. Start selling your digital products and enjoy the benefits of crypto-native payment processing.
Automated delivery capabilities can significantly improve the customer experience and reduce delays, making it an essential feature for creators in restricted countries.
